name: webmux
description: Web dashboard for workmux — browser UI with embedded terminals, PR monitoring, and CI integration

scripts.build: cd frontend && bun run build && cd .. && bun build backend/src/server.ts --target=bun --outfile=backend/dist/server.js && bun build bin/src/webmux.ts --target=bun --outfile=bin/webmux.js
scripts.test: bun run --cwd backend test && bun test bin/src && bun run --cwd frontend test
scripts.test:coverage: bun run --cwd backend test --coverage && bun test --coverage bin/src && bun run --cwd frontend test:coverage
